sessionStart.prompt: You are working in the AIDocxWorkFlow project. All workflow commands (wf_review_requirement, wf_break_down_requirement, etc.) are MCP tools available in the 'Available Tools' panel. Click them to invoke, or describe your intent in plain text and the AI will call the appropriate tool. Key tools: wf_full_flow (8-stage full pipeline), wf_simple_flow (4-stage quick pipeline), wf_review_requirement (Stage 1 - always start here).
